backend.changelog: Pre-Generate close-foreign-docs prompt now runs BEFORE attempting to open the BOM root assembly. Workstation Apply Update for CadBridge 1.8.53 strongly recommended -- BOM root no longer gets closed and reopened in the 3DPDF post-loop on Part-as-root or single-candidate Assembly-as-root BOMs.

cadBridge.changelog: Stability fix: reverts the automatic 'clean session' behaviour added in 1.8.56, which on large assemblies could close and reopen the model, mark documents as changed, and slow Generate down. Generate now behaves exactly as it did in 1.8.55. Recommended update for anyone on 1.8.56. To avoid the revision-conflict dialog on large assemblies, open the assembly into an empty SolidWorks session (close all documents first).
